Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: mercantile buildings [300005230], commercial buildings [300005147], single built works by function [300004894], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Buildings, either small or large, offering merchandise for retail sale.
Edificio que ofrece mercancía para la venta, generalmente al por menor.
Gebouwen waar handelswaar te koop wordt aangeboden, meestal detailhandel.
Gebäude, das Waren zum Verkauf anbietet, gewöhnlich im Einzelhandel.
Edifícios de pequeno ou grande porte que oferecem mercadorias para venda a varejo.
供販售商品的建築物，以零售為主。

Source.Source_ID: 2000039651/Canadian Thesaurus of Construction Science and Technology (1978)
